case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MARLYN E GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 70826379) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
